svg.text: decode.csl — one-token GEMV layer stack + round-resident KV retain (S6a working tree)

decode = the transpose of prefill: m=1 (one token), so every GEMM degenerates to a GEMV closed by a P-1 chain all-reduce — no Cannon in this file. ref: test_sim_2x2block_kv_varlen.json, 2x2 blocks, 8x8 PE/block, 7 layers -> [1,2,2,2]
! This diagram describes the UNCOMMITTED working tree of branch lexu/staging/s6a-inner-pe-kv-route-a — line numbers do not match origin/main
1. Spatial layout: two row regions (serpentine block pipeline) + which axis each tensor is sharded on
per-step Z -> HT_tail (result_color, P-6) + G-4 header n_steps
Inside one block (8x8): which axis holds what
round-robin on Y: PE p owns p, p+8, p+16, ...
the six reconfig_allreduce_axis calls switch between these rows (G-3)
2. * S6a critical path: retain is NOT a compiled-in param — it arrives every round, as DATA, at every PE (G-13 spare-slot scalar broadcast)
col c gets c+1, keeps last
K/V phase: zero KV on wire
fresh round (retain_rt=0): retained_len := this round's prefill (:290) | iter_num_bank[l] := this round's prefill (:305) | n_steps := decode_len x 8 (:298)

retain round (retain_rt=1): retained_len keeps the host's slot-2 value | iter_num_bank[l] := retained_len, cache reused in place | RoPE still re-seeds from (1,0), but rotates retained_len times (:699)
Gate 0 conclusion: the KV window is just each PE's own iter_num counter, so rewind / continue moves ZERO wavelets — that is the whole mechanism M1's T0 in-place reuse needs
3. Task machine: per-round loop -> per-token (step) loop -> per-layer straight line; 'repaint' = G-3 axis change
each round returns to kv_ingress (resident serve loop, NUM_ROUNDS times)
next layer of the same token: set_layer(l+1), back to RMSNorm(X)
G-3 repaints are unfenced; safety rests on every all_reduce_* being synchronous + multi-tx broadcast
(invariant at comm_pe.csl:1325-1334; break any clause and you get a sim-green, silent device hang)

Colors / queues: reduce 1,2 + 3,4 + bcast 5 (P-1 / P-7, axis chosen by the G-3 repaint) | intra_row_bcast 6 / IQ2,OQ0 (P-2) | inter_block 19,20 / q0,q1 (P-6) | x_input 23 / IQ0 | kv_ingress 17,21 / IQ7,OQ7 (P-5 + G-13 + G-14) | result_color / OQ0 (P-6 + G-4).
Correctness is count-exactness: both ends of a link must derive the same wavelet count. A mismatch is a SILENT HANG, not an error.
